prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L92-derived, 362ci) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (2.3L twin-vortices, 10psi boost) paired with a custom billet 8-rib serpentine drive system and a Kenne Bell Boost-A-Pump to maintain fuel pressure under load, pushing ~650rwHP on E85 with a Motec M150 ECU managing a full flex-fuel and boost-by-gear strategy

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Harrop heavy-duty 9.5-inch differential with 3.73:1 gearing, C&R Racing dual-pass aluminum radiator with integrated transmission cooler, and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring MagnaFlow Competition Series mufflers and 409-grade mandrel-bent piping with a X-pipe crossover for optimized scavenging

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Maloo’s 1,750kg weight), Whiteline adjustable front sway bar (24mm hollow) and rear sway bar (22mm solid), along with SuperPro poly bushings (full kit) and a Harrop adjustable panhard rod to eliminate axle tramp under hard launches
estetica: Custom carbon fiber widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Maloo-specific kit (extended fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon weave accents on the hood and roof

HRE FF01 wheels (20x10 +15 front, 20x12 +25 rear) in Satin Black with Nitto NT05R tires (275/30 front, 315/25 rear) and a custom HSV Heritage grille insert with a 3D-printed carbon fiber mesh and LED DRLs integrated into the lower bumper

Interior rework featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, Alcantara inserts) with custom HSV embroidery, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub, and a full custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses
